tabs.tab_content: Yes. Real results take time. Foundations is a 3-month minimum, Flagship runs 6 months, Apex is ongoing retainer.

tabs.tab_title: Do you take remote / online clients?
tabs.tab_content: Only in Tier 02 (Flagship) and Tier 03 (Apex). Foundations requires in-person sessions at the Ft. Lauderdale studio for the full 90 days.

tabs.tab_title: I have a history of injuries. Am I a fit?
tabs.tab_content: Almost certainly yes. A huge part of the work is rebuilding movement and pain-free strength. Flag injuries in the brief so we can scope the assessment properly.
Anyone looking for a templated plan, group fitness, or a guarantee without work. The method only works if you show up and execute.
Billy's team reads every brief personally. If the fit looks right, we schedule a 45-minute consultation within 48 hours. If not, you'll hear back with honest guidance.

settings.editor: Two-time winner of the World's Best Personal Trainer Contest. Fitness Hall of Fame. Trainer to Tony Robbins and elite NFL athletes.
Serious about transforming your body and mind? Start the conversation.
